zh.Llansanwyr, Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根利安善納
zh.Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素

zh.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth於大約1165年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾。他和Sara le Sore至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他於1171年登記服兵役。他於1175年在法國被列為served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france。他去世於1204年在威爾士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth于大约1165年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾。他和Sara le Sore至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他于1171年登记服兵役。他于1175年在法国被列为served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france。他去世于1204年在威尔士卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Sais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Orlando, Angelita, Arturo, Delfina, Desiderio, Dionicio, Edgardo, Elva, Fidel, Isidoro, Jere.
Catalan: topographic name from saix ‘rock’ (from Latin saxum), or an ethnic name for a Saxon, derived from the root of saxó ‘Saxon’.

en.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth was born about 1165, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Sara le Sore. He registered for military service in 1171. In 1175, at the age of 11, his occupation is listed as served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france in France. He died in 1204, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 40.

fr.Llansanwyr, Glamorgan, Wales: Llansannor, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth est né environ 1165, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Sara le Sore. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1171. En 1175, à l’âge de 11 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france à France. Il est décédé en 1204, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth wurde um 1165 in Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren. Er hatte mit Sara le Sore mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1171 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1175, als er 11 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france in Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth è nato il circa 1165 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Sara le Sore. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1171. Nel 1175, all'età di 11 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france nel Francia. Morì nel 1204, nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.Llansanwyr, Glamorgan, Wales: イギリスウェールズグラモーガンランサノー
ja.Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales: ウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストル

ja.Of Carmarthenshire, Wales: イギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarthは約1165年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた。彼はSara le Soreとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1171年に兵役登録をした。1175年，11歳の時，フランスでの職業はserved king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in franceと記録されている。彼は1204年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth(은)는 대략 1165년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Sara le Sore(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1171년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1175년, 11세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스에서 served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france이었다. 그는 1204년 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Sara le Sore. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1171. Em 1175, com 11 anos, sua profissão aparece como served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france em França. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 40 anos.

ro.Llansanwyr, Glamorgan, Wales: Llansannor, Glamorgan, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth родился около 1165 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Sara le Sore. В 1171 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1175 году, в возрасте 11 год, работал по профессии served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france в местности Франция. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Rhys - 12, Lord of Deheubarth nació aproximadamente 1165, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Sara le Sore. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1171. En 1175, a la edad de 11 años, su ocupación registrada era served king henry ii while he was attending to his lands in france en Francia. Murió en 1204, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 40 años.
